payload.answer: I’m not sure what “the thing from yesterday” refers to. Please specify the detail you want remembered.
repair_options: Clarify the exact fact or preference you want saved from yesterday.
Provide more context, such as the topic, person, project, or conversation it relates to.
If there were multiple relevant things yesterday, list them and indicate which should be remembered.
If this refers to an existing memory, identify it so it can be considered for update or clarification.
